title: Heath Cruckshank
extract: Heath Cruckshank (born 28 June 1976) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played during the 1990 and 2000s. He played for the South Queensland Crushers, Gold Coast Chargers, Leigh Centurions, Sheffield Eagles, St. Helens R.F.C., and Halifax Panthers. His position of choice was second-row.
